infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SYNAP uses your camera to scan food and analyze training photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SYNAP accesses your photo library so you can upload progress, food, and form photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: SYNAP saves progress share cards to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: SYNAP reads Apple Health data so Ion can personalize coaching.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: SYNAP writes selected workouts and measurements to Apple Health.

plugins.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: SYNAP reads Apple Health data so Ion can personalize coaching.
plugins.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: SYNAP writes selected workouts and measurements to Apple Health.
